g.text: Mirror an SSH shell session to a second client (live session monitoring and injection)
This plugin opens a secondary SSH listener on a random port for each intercepted session. A second
client (e.g. a security analyst) can connect to that port with a plain
session in real time. The mirror client can also type into the terminal - keystrokes are forwarded
to the remote server as if they came from the original user.
Start SSH-MITM with the mirror-shell plugin::
